item.title: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 19 Mar 2026
item.description: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 19 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 3,084.8, down 4.03% from previous levels. The stock’s performance today reflected broader sector weakness and immediate selling pressure, resulting in a 3.08% drop by market close. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Grovy India Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.35.02
item.description: Grovy India Ltd, a player in the Realty sector, touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.35.02 today, marking a significant decline amid broader market fluctuations and sectoral pressures. The stock’s performance continues to trail key benchmarks, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial metrics and valuation. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Poddar Pigments Ltd. Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amid Continued Underperformance
item.description: Poddar Pigments Ltd., a micro-cap player in the Dyes and Pigments sector, has recently touched a 52-week low, closing just 0.42% above its lowest price of Rs 211.1. This marks a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory, reflecting persistent challenges in its financial performance and market positioning. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Jyothy Labs Ltd. Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.208.5
item.description: Jyothy Labs Ltd., a small-cap player in the FMCG sector, recorded a new 52-week low of Rs.208.5 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader sectoral weakness and subdued market sentiment. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Vishal Bearings Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.47 Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Vishal Bearings Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.47 today, marking a significant decline amid persistent downward momentum. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting ongoing pressures on its valuation and financial metrics. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Sunil Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Sunil Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Trading & Distributors sector, has touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.62.15 today, marking a significant decline amid sustained downward momentum over recent sessions. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Ambuja Cements Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.423.9 Amidst Broad Market Weakness
item.description: Ambuja Cements Ltd’s stock declined sharply to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.423.9 on 19 Mar 2026, marking a significant downturn amid a broadly negative market environment. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting ongoing pressures on its financial performance and valuation metrics. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Cropster Agro Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Cropster Agro Ltd, a micro-cap player in the packaging sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.6.52 today, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting ongoing pressures on its valuation and price momentum. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Sanghi Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Weak Financial Metrics
item.description: Sanghi Industries Ltd, a player in the Cement & Cement Products sector, has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.50.81, marking a significant downturn in its stock performance amid broader market volatility and sectoral pressures. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Sunil Healthcare Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.58.4 Amid Market Volatility
item.description: Sunil Healthcare Ltd’s stock declined sharply to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.58.4 today, marking a significant downturn amid a volatile trading session and broader market pressures. The stock’s performance contrasts with the modest recovery seen in the Sensex, underscoring sector-specific and company-level challenges. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Bhagiradha Chemicals & Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.183.2
item.description: Bhagiradha Chemicals & Industries Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.183.2, marking a significant downturn in its stock price amid broader market fluctuations and company-specific performance factors. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 950.1, reflecting a 3.0% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader sector and market weakness. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: JSW Steel Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 19 Mar 2026
item.description: JSW Steel Ltd. experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,144.2, reflecting a 2.99% drop as the stock faced immediate selling pressure amid broader market volatility and sector underperformance. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: TVS Motor Company Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 19 Mar 2026
item.description: Shares of TVS Motor Company Ltd declined sharply on 19 Mar 2026, hitting an intraday low of Rs 3,463.45 as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market amid prevailing price pressures and cautious market sentiment. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Synoptics Technologies Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Synoptics Technologies Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 19 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit with a maximum daily loss of 4.91%. The stock closed at a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹45.55, reflecting intense selling pressure and panic among investors. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Shrenik Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shrenik Ltd, a micro-cap player in the miscellaneous sector, faced intense selling pressure on 19 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit and registering a maximum daily loss of 4.88%. The stock’s sharp decline outpaced both its sector and the broader Sensex, signalling panic selling and unfilled supply weighing heavily on investor sentiment. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Morarjee Textiles Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Morarjee Textiles Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 19 Mar 2026, reflecting intense selling pressure and panic among investors. The stock recorded a maximum daily loss of 3.04%, sharply underperforming the broader market indices and its sector peers. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Sambhaav Media Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Sambhaav Media Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Media & Entertainment sector, witnessed intense selling pressure on 19 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit and registering its maximum daily loss in recent sessions. The stock’s fall reflects mounting investor concerns amid a sustained downtrend and deteriorating technical indicators. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Bajaj Finance Ltd Sees Heavy Value Trading Amid Sector Downturn
item.description: Bajaj Finance Ltd, a leading large-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, witnessed significant trading activity on 19 Mar 2026, with a total traded value exceeding ₹363 crore. Despite this high liquidity and investor interest, the stock underperformed the sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures within the NBFC space. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Brightcom Group Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Brightcom Group Ltd plunged sharply on 19 Mar 2026, hitting the lower circuit limit as intense selling pressure gripped the stock. The small-cap IT software company saw its price fall by 4.8%, closing at ₹8.73, just 1.37% above its 52-week low of ₹8.61, signalling heightened investor anxiety and panic selling in a weak market environment. Time: 22 minutes ago
